---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the game
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or motivation

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve or the opportunity it creates.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Game systems affected

Which parts of the game would this touch?

- [ ] Economy / Finance
- [ ] Infrastructure / Cooling
- [ ] Networking / Traffic
- [ ] Incidents / Reliability
- [ ] Staff / Operations
- [ ] Progression / Achievements
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Phaser rendering
- [ ] Multi-site / Global expansion
- [ ] Other: ___

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, references to similar games, or links to relevant items in `BRAINSTORM.md`.
